Thank you for purchasing our template

Version: 0.1.0
Create: September 16, 2025
Author: Themesflat
In this document, we provide all kinds of good information with all the details you need to use our template. We hope you have fun and enjoy working with our template

If you have any question need support create ticket id https://themesflat.ticksy.com/ I will ready support for you. Thank so much

Getting Started

Introduction

Ochaka. is a premium ReactJs template designed for flexibility, performance, and versatility. It’s the perfect choice for building online stores across industries like fashion, electronics, home decor, and more.

Every demo in Ochaka. is crafted with care, offering a seamless user experience and a fully responsive design that adapts beautifully to all screen sizes and devices.

With full e-commerce functionality, smooth navigation, and blazing-fast performance, Ochaka. empowers you to showcase and sell products effectively. It’s more than just a template—it's your complete digital storefront.

Features

Below are some features of this web app template:

  • React 19
  • Bootstrap 5.3.5
  • 20 Home pages (update+)
  • 60+ inner pages
  • 100+ sections
  • User Account Pages
  • Multi - Product Layouts
  • Product style detail
  • Unlimited Colors
  • Ajax Contact Form
  • Ajax Appointment Form
  • 04 Blog Page
  • Brand Page
  • Contact Page
  • FAQ Page
  • Responsive Template
  • Free icons used
  • Pixel Perfect
  • Clean & Unique Design
  • Easy to customize
  • Retina Ready
  • Filter product
  • Popup cart, popup search
  • Parallax Effect
  • & much more...

Run Project

1. Download and install Node.js and NPM : You can download Node.js from https://nodejs.org. NPM comes bundled with Node.js.

2. Purchase Item: After purchase from Envato you have folder itemname-package Extract i have folder itemname. You please copy file go to D:/itemname

3. Use cmd with Windows Terminal : Go go the folder D:\itemname Type command: npm install --> npm run dev

4. In your browser navigate to http://localhost:3000

5.Thats all! Now you should see your site.

For the case Visual Studio Code Open Folder Project (open Visual Studio Code) => Open Terminal (Ctrl + `) => Type command: npm i (or yarn) --> npm install (or yarn install)

How to customize Template

Instructions below help you to change the content, custom css and js for the template

  • Update the content for template



  • Edit CSS for template



  • Edit Data for template




  • Set router link for page




  • Edit component, js




Structure

Instructions below help you to change the content, custom css and js for the template

File & Folder Structure

Ochaka React Template
|── public 
  ├── css
  ├── font 
  ├── icon
  ├── images
  ├── scss 
├── src
  ├── components
  ├── context
  ├── data
  ├── pages
  ├── utlis 
├── jsconfig.json 
├── package.json 
└── vite.config

Dependencies

package.json

{
	"name": "ochaka-reactjs",
	"private": true,
	"version": "0.0.0",
	"type": "module",
	"scripts": {
		"dev": "vite",
		"build": "vite build",
		"lint": "eslint .",
		"preview": "vite preview"
	},
	"dependencies": {
		"axios": "^1.11.0",
		"bootstrap": "^5.3.7",
		"drift-zoom": "^1.5.1",
		"photoswipe": "^5.4.4",
		"rc-slider": "^11.1.8",
		"react": "^19.1.1",
		"react-compare-slider": "^3.1.0",
		"react-dom": "^19.1.1",
		"react-router-dom": "^7.8.1",
		"sass": "^1.90.0",
		"swiper": "^11.2.10"
	},
	"devDependencies": {
		"@eslint/js": "^9.33.0",
		"@types/react": "^19.1.10",
		"@types/react-dom": "^19.1.7",
		"@vitejs/plugin-react-swc": "^4.0.0",
		"eslint": "^9.33.0",
		"eslint-plugin-react-hooks": "^5.2.0",
		"eslint-plugin-react-refresh": "^0.4.20",
		"globals": "^16.3.0",
		"vite": "^7.1.2"
	}
}

Credits & Official Documentation

We’ve used the following resources as listed. These are some awesome creation and we are thankful to the community.

  • React
  • React Router Dom
  • Bootstrap 5
  • Photoswipe (https://photoswipe.com/getting-started/)
  • Swiper (https://swiperjs.com/)
  • SASS (https://sass-lang.com/)
